headline: Southside Savages: Preseason Front Office Brief
executive_summary: Southside Savages is projected #7 of 16 with a 626.50 projected-starting-lineup C-AVI total, led by Drake Maye, Josh Jacobs, and Tetairoa McMillan. The immediate priority is improving the TE slot without weakening that core.

projected_power.method: Sum of the eight verified projected starters' C-AVI values from all 16 AVI-Core team files

dynasty_power.method: Sum of every verified rostered player's D-AVI value from all 16 AVI-Core team files

latest_trade.summary: On October 14, Southside Savages traded with Roster 3 and acquired Tetairoa McMillan while sending 2026 Round 1 (Southside Savages), 2026 Round 2 (Southside Savages). Tetairoa McMillan is now the current WR starter at 85.6 C-AVI and 87.2 D-AVI; The deal sent out 2 draft assets, reducing future flexibility.

gap_closing_moves: Raise the TE slot above Colby Parkinson's 44.8 C-AVI baseline; a replacement near 58.6 C-AVI would directly attack the 13.80-point projected gap to Ravens Regime.
Use draft capital as a targeted sweetener for a verified starting-lineup upgrade, not for additional bench depth.

latest_trade.summary: On July 13, All Hail King Jesus traded with Ravens Regime and acquired Isiah Pacheco, 2026 Round 1 (Southside Savages) while sending Derrick Henry. Isiah Pacheco is now on the current roster at 47.6 C-AVI and 63.4 D-AVI; The deal added 1 draft asset.

rival_below.summary: On July 13, All Hail King Jesus traded with Ravens Regime and acquired Isiah Pacheco, 2026 Round 1 (Southside Savages) while sending Derrick Henry. Isiah Pacheco is now on the current roster at 47.6 C-AVI and 63.4 D-AVI; The deal added 1 draft asset.

sections.title: Projected Power Position
sections.body: Projected #7 of 16 at 626.50 lineup C-AVI. Ravens Regime is immediately above at 640.30, a gap of 13.80. All Hail King Jesus is immediately behind at 625.30.

sections.title: Competitive Core
sections.body: The three highest C-AVI starters are Drake Maye (98.3), Josh Jacobs (88.0), and Tetairoa McMillan (85.6).

sections.body: Raise the TE slot above Colby Parkinson's 44.8 C-AVI baseline; a replacement near 58.6 C-AVI would directly attack the 13.80-point projected gap to Ravens Regime. Use draft capital as a targeted sweetener for a verified starting-lineup upgrade, not for additional bench depth.
